name: FINE 2000LH iSPOT
comment: FINE 2000LH iSPOT是一款高性能专业电脑摇头灯。采用1000W 高效LED模组光源，设计寿命大于20000小时；三种使用场景模式选择，噪音低至39dB； 65536级电子调光，平滑细腻，低亮度起光无闪烁；全新光学设计，5°~50°线性变焦，任意角度始终保持光束锐利饱满，成像清晰；采用彩熠第二代颜色标准，色彩纯正，CMY混色极佳；整灯小巧，轻量化设计，重量仅37kg。 产品适用于电视台、剧院、舞台、演唱会、大型晚会、车展等高端场所，尤其适合剧院、音乐厅等对噪音要求高的场所。

capabilities.comment: Mode 1M The console controls all attributes except the XY attribute
Mode 2 The console controls all attributes except those of the head mapped to the faders and wheels and the XY attribute
Mode 3 The console controls all attributes except those of the head mapped to the faders XY attributes
Mode 4 Console control of all attributes
Mode 1M The console controls all attributes except the XY attribute
Mode 2 The console controls all attributes except those of the head mapped to the faders and wheels and the XY attribute
Mode 3 The console controls all attributes except those of the head mapped to the faders XY attributes
Mode 4 Console control of all attributes
